response.justification: Bogdan meets the experience requirement with 20 years in engineering and demonstrates technical leadership through multiple staff-level roles. His current position at re:cinq in AI-agent infrastructure is directly relevant. However, he lacks the preferred Master's/PhD in AI, his AI expertise is brand new (April 2025) without demonstrated track record of recognized AI products/platforms, and there is no evidence of the strategic customer advisory or platform architecture experience expected at the Director-level principal engineer level for this role.
strengths: 20 years of progressive engineering experience exceeding 15-year requirement, with multiple staff-level positions demonstrating technical leadership
Current role directly relevant—working on AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows at re:cinq since April 2025
Strong full-stack capabilities across web, mobile, desktop, embedded systems, with cloud infrastructure experience (AWS, Kubernetes, Docker)
concerns: AI expertise is recent and unproven—no prior track record of building recognized AI products or platforms; current AI work just started April 2025
Missing preferred Master's/PhD in AI-related field; only holds Bachelor's degrees in CS and Photography/Design

No evidence of strategic customer advisory, platform architecture thinking, or director-level strategic leadership required for this principal engineer role; background is primarily application-layer engineering

key_factors.factor: Years of experience and technical progression
AI specialization depth and demonstrated products
